context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the apply-ecto-conventions instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when writing or reviewing Ecto database code to ensure consistent, idiomatic patterns.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Never call Repo from LiveViews or controllers** — all database operations belong in context modules

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Prefer non-bang functions** in application logic (`Repo.get/1`, `Repo.insert/1`) — use bang only in tests

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Always preload associations** outside loops to prevent N+1 queries

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use Ecto.Multi for 2+ related operations** — never chain multiple Repo calls in sequence without a transaction

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Never combine schema changes and data backfill** in the same migration

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Checkpoint:** Run Ecto query log observer in development to detect N+1 violations.
